ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the opponent */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the opponent represents */,
  "opponent_age" INTEGER /* Age of the opponent */,
  "opponent_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the opponent */,
  "opponent_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the opponent */,
  "opponent_height" TEXT /* Height of the opponent in meters */,
  "opponent_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the opponent in kilograms */,
  "opponent_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., International, National) */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money of the tournament */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., Round 1, Quarter-final) */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, Upcoming, Postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Match the result belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who participated in the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Opponent in the match */,
  "set_score" INTEGER /* Set score of the match */,
  "streak" INTEGER /* Winning streak of the player */,
  "set1_score" TEXT /* Score of the first set */,
  "set2_score" TEXT /* Score of the second set */,
  "set3_score" TEXT /* Score of the third set (if applicable) */,
  "total_points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "total_points_conceded" INTEGER /* Total points conceded by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "match_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Match the detail belongs to */,
  "match_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "match_court" TEXT /* Court number where the match is played */,
  "match_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and court conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who participated in the tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Tournament the player participated in */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the tournament (e.g., Singles, Doubles Partner) */,
  "player_category" TEXT /* Category of the player (e.g., Men's Singles, Women's Doubles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
